<ul>
<li>
<p>Other types a Community Meeting</p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>A proposal for topical deep-dives on Meshery deep-dives - using the same day/time slot on the community calendar.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>A proposal for Community meeting. [Lee in response to Sulgana]: Ideally, the back half of the Newcomers meeting is ideal and intended for these.</p>

</li>
<li>

</li>
